name: Grafana Cloud
description: Observability platform for metrics, logs, and traces. Verifies monitoring configuration, app availability, and user access in Grafana Cloud.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Grafana Cloud instance (e.g. https://mycompany.grafana.net)
2. Go to Administration > Service Accounts
3. Create a service account with Admin role (required for user access checks)
4. Generate a service account token (starts with glsa_)
5. Enter your stack URL and the token below

credentialFields.label: Grafana Stack URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Grafana Cloud stack URL, e.g. https://mycompany.grafana.net

credentialFields.label: Service Account Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a service account with Admin role in your Grafana instance: Administration > Service Accounts > create a token.

checks.name: Grafana Cloud App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Grafana Cloud is accessible and the service account token is valid

checks.name: Grafana Cloud Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Grafana Cloud users to verify access controls are in place

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that Grafana Cloud alert rules are configured for monitoring

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that Grafana Cloud datasources are configured for monitoring
